summary: Trust Ledger / Field History Layer testing complete. Backend: 17/17 tests PASSED. All ledger endpoints working correctly. Frontend: Profile page verified with field-trust-block (value=56.1, risk=9.7, state=יציב) and ai-profile-interpretation.
critical_code_review_comments: write_ledger() correctly writes immutable entries with all required fields (id, user_id, source_flow, action_type, impact, authenticity, computed_value_delta, computed_risk_delta, trust_score_after, timestamp, metadata)
POST /api/actions creates ledger with source_flow='manual' and computed_value_delta > 0
POST /api/risk-signal creates ledger with source_flow='manual' and computed_risk_delta > 0
GET /api/user/{user_id}/trust-history returns TrustHistoryResponse with summary_by_source and summary_by_action_type
Limit parameter correctly clamps to min=1, max=500
run_daily_decay() writes ledger entries with source_flow='decay' when deltas are non-zero
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user. Added ledger entries via manual action, risk signal, and globe point tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust Ledger system fully verified. New endpoint GET /api/user/{user_id}/trust-history returns TrustHistoryResponse with: user_id, value_score, risk_score, trust_score, total_ledger_entries, summary_by_source (counts and totals per source_flow), summary_by_action_type (counts and totals per action), and ledger array (LedgerEntry objects). Ledger entries auto-created by POST /api/actions (source='manual'), POST /api/risk-signal (source='manual'), POST /api/orientation/globe-point (source='globe_point'). Profile page displays field-trust-block with value/risk/state values.

mocked_apis.note: All trust ledger APIs use real database writes and reads
